goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
notes: Task 0075 verified PASS and merged via PR #118 (squash merge commit ba01ea64bc046b0ad89582d0ad51275eafb91f1f) on 2026-05-29.
PR CI run 26610166103 (11/11 jobs success) and post-merge main CI run 26610557793 (11/11 jobs success) both applied 110_billing_foundation to stage and prod Supabase.
Billing foundation now live on main: migration 110_billing_foundation, @saas/db/billing repository, @saas/contracts/billing types, package exports/test mappings, 30 db tests + 14 contract tests.
Repository is parameterized SQL only, org-scoped on every accessor, with cross-org invoice upsert guarded by ON CONFLICT WHERE org_id = EXCLUDED.org_id. No metering.* references in billing code.
Contracts are provider-neutral and secret-safe; opaque provider/hostedUrl fields only.
Migration is idempotent (CREATE … IF NOT EXISTS throughout) and applies cleanly under the Supabase autocommit runner.
